extract: Dragonite (Japanese: カイリュー Kairyu) is a dual-type Dragon/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Dragonair starting at level 55. It is the final form of Dratini. Dragonite can Mega Evolve into Mega Dragonite using the Dragoninite. Mega Dragonite was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans.
